title: habenaria habenarioides
intro: Habenaria habenarioides, also known as the lesser orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, boost immunity, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
